creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 144701
patch for graphics/shotwell

shotwell 0.18.1 is out, fixing an issue in the flickr uploader (among others): https://mail.gnome.org/archives/shotwell-list/2014-July/msg00000.html

Futher, corrected the dependencies to point to gnome3 components, as reported by olivierd@ by mail.
